mapper.sql: select id, framework_id, item_name, item_type, severity, check_rule, sort_num, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_quality_item
mapper.select: where framework_id = #{frameworkId} and enabled = '1' and del_flag = '0' order by sort_num asc, id asc
select ifnull(max(sort_num), 0) from tdw_quality_item where framework_id = #{frameworkId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_quality_item(framework_id, item_name, item_type, severity, check_rule, sort_num, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{frameworkId}, #{itemName}, #{itemType}, #{severity}, #{checkRule}, #{sortNum}, #{enabled}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_quality_item set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}

update tdw_quality_item set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where framework_id in
#{id}
